summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU stuck at 99% on Morpheus devices (VOY5200,VOY8200)
feature: Android DFU (Device Firmware Update) - Morpheus Devices
scenario: Language update on Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200) gets stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, extending total update time from 1-2 minutes to over 10 minutes.
description_clean: Language update (LANG UPDATE) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes on Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200) before completing. Previously, language changes took 1-2 minutes, but now they last 10 minutes or more. Expected behavior: language update should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices.
steps: 1. Initiate a language update (LANG UPDATE) on a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Observe the progress of the language update.
3. Note the time when the update reaches 99%.
4. Continue monitoring until the update completes.
5. Record the total time taken for the language update to complete.
expected: Language update should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices.
actual: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes, with the total update time lasting 10 minutes or more.
